description: You are a clinical bioinformatician analyzing a patient's SARS-CoV-2 sequencing data. Map the patient's short sequencing reads (~/UGENE_Data/ngs/patient_reads.fastq) to the SARS-CoV-2 Spike gene reference (~/UGENE_Data/ngs/sars2_spike_reference.fasta) using the UGENE Genome Aligner. Save the resulting alignment to ~/UGENE_Data/ngs/results/alignment.bam and export the consensus sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/ngs/results/patient_consensus.fasta. Document the completion of the mapping and the aligner used in a summary report at ~/UGENE_Data/ngs/results/mapping_report.txt.
